LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-27-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS DRAGONFLY ASSETS C-52, LLC, AND AMIT HELLER'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON JANUARY 10, 2024. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 29, 2023. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS DRAGONFLY ASSETS C-52, LLC AND AMIT HELLER'S NOTICE OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO HACKETT DECLARATION ARE SUSTAINED. THERE IS A BINDING ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN THE PARTIES' CONTRACT AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW ANY PROCEDURAL OR SUBSTANTIVE UNCONSCIONABILITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
